key_items: Bitcoin fell 21% after Strategy's debt buyback news with $60K support being tested
Professional investors dumped 52K BTC worth of ETFs in Q1 as hedge funds exited positions
Michael Saylor blames $400 billion capital rotation into AI as Bitcoin dives, with Strategy recording $10.8 billion unrealized loss
reasoning: Multiple negative catalysts converge: institutional outflows (ETF dumping), forced liquidations from Strategy's liquidity crisis, and sustained capital rotation into AI equities are creating downward pressure on BTC. While $60K mining cost support and long-term allocator accumulation provide some floor, the 1-7 day outlook remains negative as these selling pressures persist and test key support levels.
risks: A break below the $60K support level could trigger further institutional panic selling and cascade liquidations similar to the Terra Luna doom-loop pattern referenced in headlines.
